design_note: Each of the 3 Customer endpoints has exactly 40 functional test cases. Missing and invalid inputs are split into separate granular cases rather than lumped into generic validations.

endpoints.name: Create / Save Customer Draft
functional_requirements: FR-CUS-API-01-01: The system shall allow authorized affiliate users to create or save customer information before card product selection.
FR-CUS-API-01-02: The system shall persist customer draft data with tenant and affiliate scope.
FR-CUS-API-01-03: The system shall validate required customer identity fields before saving a customer draft.
FR-CUS-API-01-04: The system shall validate customer contact fields before saving a customer draft.
FR-CUS-API-01-05: The system shall validate customer KYC fields before saving a customer draft.
FR-CUS-API-01-06: The system shall support customer draft status values including DRAFT and PENDING_CARD_ISSUANCE.
FR-CUS-API-01-07: The system shall prevent duplicate customer draft creation where the same identity reference already exists within tenant or affiliate scope.
FR-CUS-API-01-08: The system shall enforce IAM authorization and tenant scope before accepting customer draft creation.
FR-CUS-API-01-09: The system shall return customerDraftId and persisted draft status after successful save.
FR-CUS-API-01-10: The system shall record customer draft creation or update activity in AuditLog.

test_cases.test_description: Verify authorized affiliate user can create a customer draft with valid customer information.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Affiliate user; tenant and affiliate context valid.
test_cases.input_data: Valid identity, contact, address, KYC fields; status=DRAFT.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify draft can be saved as PENDING_CARD_ISSUANCE when issuance flow has started.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Affiliate user; valid customer data.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

endpoints.name: Search Customers
functional_requirements: FR-CUS-API-02-01: The system shall allow authorized users to search customers within permitted tenant, affiliate, or bank scope.
FR-CUS-API-02-02: The system shall support search by customer name.
FR-CUS-API-02-03: The system shall support search by phone number.
FR-CUS-API-02-04: The system shall support search by email address.
FR-CUS-API-02-05: The system shall support search by identity type and identity number.
FR-CUS-API-02-06: The system shall support filtering by customer status.
FR-CUS-API-02-07: The system shall support filtering by KYC status and KYC level.
FR-CUS-API-02-08: The system shall support pagination for customer search results.
FR-CUS-API-02-09: The system shall return customer summary records in a normalized response wrapper.
FR-CUS-API-02-10: The system shall enforce tenant and affiliate scope isolation before returning customer results.
FR-CUS-API-02-11: The system shall reject invalid search filters or unsupported filter combinations.
FR-CUS-API-02-12: The system shall record customer search activity where audit policy requires it.

test_cases.test_description: Verify authorized user can search customers within permitted scope.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify search supports pageSize=1.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with one or fewer customer summaries.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: Rejected or ignored according to contract.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: Only matching phone customer summaries returned.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: 403 or empty result without data leakage.

test_cases.test_description: Verify customer search is audited where required.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: AuditLog entry created where policy requires.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed JSON is rejected.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify search response wrapper contract is valid.
steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: Response includes page, pageSize, data array and expected metadata.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Customer Details
functional_requirements: FR-CUS-API-03-01: The system shall allow authorized users to retrieve customer detail by customerId.
FR-CUS-API-03-02: The system shall enforce IAM authorization and tenant or affiliate scope before returning customer detail.
FR-CUS-API-03-03: The system shall return customer identity, contact, address, KYC, status, tenant, and affiliate information.
FR-CUS-API-03-04: The system shall return linked card or card issuance references where available.
FR-CUS-API-03-05: The system shall prevent users from retrieving customers outside their permitted scope.
FR-CUS-API-03-06: The system shall return 404 when the specified customerId does not exist.
FR-CUS-API-03-07: The system shall return customer detail in read-only form.
FR-CUS-API-03-08: The system shall mask or exclude sensitive fields according to platform policy.
FR-CUS-API-03-09: The system shall record customer detail access where audit policy requires it.

test_cases.test_description: Verify authorized caller can retrieve customer detail by customerId.

steps: Validate response status, response body, tenant/affiliate scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
